name: magicbox
description: A markdown-based note taking app like Notion

scripts.build: npm run sync-version && cd frontend && npm run build
scripts.deploy:api: npm run sync-version && cd backend && npm run deploy
scripts.deploy:web: npm run sync-version && cd frontend && npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=magicbox-app
scripts.setup: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
